## Checklist

- [ ] Code follows the [constitution](.specify/memory/constitution.md)
- [ ] SPDX license headers on all new source files
- [ ] Tests written before implementation (TDD)
- [ ] `make build` passes with zero warnings
- [ ] `make test` passes (all tests, including new ones)
- [ ] `make lint` passes with zero issues
- [ ] No magic strings — constants in `internal/consts/consts.go`
- [ ] Lines limited to 99 characters
- [ ] Commit messages follow Conventional Commits format
- [ ] Commits are signed (`-s -S`)
- [ ] PR addresses a single concern
